## 📝 Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## 🔗 Related Issues

<!-- Link issues this PR closes or references -->
Closes #

## 🧪 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test additions / updates
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI / build

## 📸 Screenshots (UI changes)

<!-- Drag & drop before/after screenshots or screen recordings here -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented complex logic where needed
- [ ] I have updated documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] No secrets / credentials committed

## 🧠 Additional Notes

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know? Trade-offs, follow-ups, etc. -->
